data.name: Blood Rose~瘟疫的起源~
data.detailed_description:
【Blood Rose~瘟疫的起源~】一款由nikukyu製作，並由072 Project代理發行的短篇2D射擊RPG遊戲。

隨著幹員蘿潔塔，探索宅邸找出生化病毒大流行的原因吧!!

在生化病毒大流行的x日後。

雖然事態逐漸平緩、但依然沒有任何人知道......病毒到底從何而起。

某天，英國情報局發現......居住在極東之國的一名博士

很有可能就是罪魁禍首。

在這場災厄還未完全平息的事態下，能出動的人員極少。

最終，被選中的只有部隊中擁有身法最為敏捷且謹慎的隊員

「羅潔塔・艾德里奇」一人而已。

羅潔塔和負責支援的搭檔「奧爾頓・撒迦利亞」使用無線電通話，

就這樣隻身前往博士的宅邸。

羅潔塔受情報局指示前往極東之國，一名博士的居所。

調查關於生化病毒大流行的真相。

卻在宅邸發現了神秘的地下室，還有一堆殭屍!!

一邊擊退殭屍，並尋找線索推進劇情吧！任何牆壁都不要放過!

別忘了隨時使用無線電和搭檔奧爾頓交換一下情報，或許他能提供一些有用的意見。

  • 2D槍戰動作RPG遊戲

  • 逃脫解謎

  • 有衣裝戰損

  • 可處女通關

  • 可跳過對話

  • 支援全屏模式

  • 可更改按鍵/可使用遊戲手把

  • 回想模式

某天，英國情報局發現......居住在極東之國的一名博士

一邊擊退殭屍，並尋找線索推進劇情吧！任何牆壁都不要放過!

別忘了隨時使用無線電和搭檔奧爾頓交換一下情報，或許他能提供一些有用的意見。

  • 2D槍戰動作RPG遊戲

  • 逃脫解謎

  • 有衣裝戰損

  • 可處女通關

  • 回想模式
data.short_description: 在生化病毒大流行後，情報局派出一名身手矯健的女幹員「羅潔塔」去極東之國調查這場災厄的真正起因。 究竟羅潔塔能不能在怪物橫行的宅邸中找出真相，並逃出生天呢?
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Blood Rose ~ Origin of the Plague
data.detailed_description:
"Blood Rose ~ Origin of the Plague ~" is a short adult 2D shoting rpg developed by nikukyu and published by 072 Project.

With Agent Rosetta, explore the mansion and uncover the cause of the large-scale outbreak of the biochemical virus!

After x days of a bio-virus pandemic,

although the situation is gradually calming down, no one knows where the virus originated from.

One day, the British intelligence agency discovers that a doctor living in a country

in the easternmost likely the mastermind behind it all.

With very few personnel available to act in this ongoing crisis,

the only one selected is a member of the team with the most agile and cautious skills,

"Rosetta Aldridge". Rosetta, along with her support partner "Oluton Zakariya",

head to the doctor's mansion alone.

Rosetta was instructed by the Intelligence Bureau to go to the Far East, to the residence of a doctor.

Investigate the truth about the large-scale outbreak of a biochemical virus. However, she discovered a mysterious underground basement in the mansion, along with a horde of zombies!!

Defeat the zombies while searching for clues to advance the plot! Don't leave any walls unchecked!

And don't forget to use the radio to exchange information with your partner "Oluton" at any time; he might provide some useful Information."

  • 2D gun battle action RPG game

  • Escape Puzzle

  • Clothing damage

  • Can be cleared as a virgin

  • Can skip dialogue

  • Supports full-screen mode

  • Keys can be changed/Gamepad can be used

  • Memory Mode

data.short_description: After a massive outbreak of a bio-virus, the intelligence agency sent a skilled female agent, "Rosetta," to the easternmost country to investigate the true cause of this catastrophe. Can Rosetta uncover the truth within the mansion haunted by monsters and make her out alive?
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
